name: Acolyte
description: You served in a temple or shrine, traveled the world in search of answers, tending to sacred duties and learning the deeper mysteries of faith.

feats.name: Blessings of Devotion
feats.description:
Your early training taught you to sanctify the moment with decisive clarity.

Choose yourself or an ally within **close** range.  
Until the end of their next turn, they gain:

- **+2** to their next **Skill Check** **OR** **Attack Roll**

If that roll is a **critical success**, you regain **1 Ambition** (once per respite).

feats.name: Ritual Adept
feats.description:
Your upbringing refined your understanding of sacred practices.

You gain:

- **Resolve** on Skill Checks to identify or interpret **rituals, divine symbols, sacred writings, or divine magic**
    
- Perform **non-combat ritual actions** in **half the normal time**
    
- Once per **long rest**, you may grant **+1 DC Tier** to a ritual when assisting another caster
    

This does _not_ grant spellcasting or ritual slots.

feats.name: Sanctified Bearing
feats.description:
Your disciplined upbringing grants an unshakable presence.

- **+1 Will Defense**
    
- **Resolve** on checks to resist **fear**, **charm**, and **compel** effects

feats.name: Insightful Wisdom
feats.description:
You provides clarity in moments of doubt.

Choose a creature within range to gain one **benefit**:

- Remove **Strain** from one attack
- Give Resolve on a **Social** or **Intuition** check

feats.name: Devout Fortitude
feats.description:
Your devotion reinforces body and spirit in moments of danger.

You gain:
- +2 maximum **Vitality**
- +1 to **Body** Defense
- When you roll **Ambition** on a saving throw (any defense), you may treat results of **1** as **2** instead.    

Once per **Respite**, when you would gain **Weakened**, you instead ignore it.

feats.name: Channeled Focus
feats.description:
Your training allows you to anchor the spiritual flow around you.

Choose a creature within **close** range.  
Until the end of their next turn, they gain **one** of the following:

- +2 to **Spell Attacks** 
- +1 to **Spell DC**
- **Resistance** to **ether**, **divine**, or **elemental** damage (choose one)

If the creature uses a **Spell** while this is active and have a **critical success**, you regain 1 **Reservoir** or **Ambition** once per target per **Long Rest**.

feats.name: Tenets of Discipline
feats.description:
Your early religious instruction instilled a rigid mental discipline.

You gain:
- **Resolve** on skill checks involving **concentration, meditation, vigilance, or resisting distraction**
- +2 **Mind** Defense
    

In addition, once per **respite**, when you would lose **Ambition** from stress or failure, you do not lose **Ambition**.

feats.name: Consecrated Action
feats.description:
Your movements carry spiritual weight, letting you mark the moment with sacred authority. When you **hit** or **succeed** on **Skill check** (Social, Lore, Intuition, or Awareness) against a target.

You may apply one of the following effects to the target:

- **Dazed** (1 round)
- **Sapped** (1 round)  
- Your next **attack** against them has **Resolve**    
- An ally within **Close** range gains +2 to their next roll against them

On a **critical success** this may instead apply **Frightened (1 round)**.

feats.name: Sacrosanct Vigor
feats.description:
Your spirit hardens your flesh; your faith reinforces your life force.

You gain:

- **+5 Maximum Vitality**   
- **+1 to all three Defenses (Body, Mind, Will)**
- When you receive healing from any source, restore an additional **+1d4 Vitality**

Additionally, once per **full rest**, when you would be reduced to **0 vitality**, instead remain at **1 vitality** and gain **Dodge**.

feats.name: Rite of Binding
feats.description:
Your ritual training lets you bind foes with sacred force. When a creature within **Close** range attempts to **move**, **dash**, **disengage**, or take a **mobility** action.

Make an opposing **Will check** against their **Will Defense**.

-  On **success**, the action is **canceled**, and the creature is **Slowed** until the end of its next turn.

-  On **critical success**, the creature becomes **Restrained** for 1 round.    

Once per **respite**, if this cancels a movement that would leave **Engagement** with an ally, the ally also gains **+2 to Attacks** until the end of their next turn.

feats.name: Mantle of Reverence
feats.description:
You manifest the presence of your faith as a commanding aura.

Creatures of your choice within **Close** range gain one of the following:

- +2 to all **Attack Rolls**
- +2 to all **Stat** Defense
- Resolve on **Intuition** and **Social** checks

Once per target, enemies entering your **Engagement** during this effect must make a **Will** check against your **Mind**, or suffer **Strain** on their next attack.

Once per **long rest**, you may instead extend the duration to **2 rounds**.

feats.name: Sacred Insight
feats.description:
You’ve been shaped by years of study, meditation, and spiritual training.

You gain:

- **Resolve** on any roll involving **forewarning**, **intuition**, **omen-reading**, or **discerning truth**
- You may reroll one failed **attack roll** or **skill check** per **respite**
- When you would be affected by a **hidden** danger (trap, ambush, deceit, magical effect), you may use your **Mind** instead of **Body** or **Will** (your choice)    

Additionally, when you succeed you and all allies within **Nearby** gain +2 to their **Defense** from the same **hidden** danger until the start of their next turn.
